nodes.name: types.rs
nodes.summary: Shared identifier and primitive types for the Prime-Radiant coherence engine (NodeId, EdgeId, GraphId, ScopeId, NamespaceId, PolicyBundleId, WitnessId, LineageId, ActorId, ApproverId, Timestamp, Hash, Version).

nodes.name: NodeId
nodes.summary: UUID-backed identifier for sheaf graph nodes; supports ordering and u64 sharding.

nodes.name: EdgeId
nodes.summary: UUID-backed edge identifier; deterministically derivable from endpoint NodeIds via blake3.

nodes.name: GraphId
nodes.summary: UUID-backed identifier for a sheaf graph instance.

nodes.name: ScopeId
nodes.summary: String-backed scope identifier for coherence isolation; defaults to 'global'.

nodes.name: NamespaceId
nodes.summary: String-backed namespace for multi-tenant isolation.

nodes.name: PolicyBundleId
nodes.summary: UUID identifier for governance policy bundles.

nodes.name: WitnessId
nodes.summary: UUID identifier for audit witness records.

nodes.name: LineageId
nodes.summary: UUID identifier for lineage records.

nodes.name: ActorId
nodes.summary: UUID identifier for actors (users or system); supports nil system actor.

nodes.name: ApproverId
nodes.summary: UUID identifier for policy approvers/signers.

nodes.name: Timestamp
nodes.summary: Nanosecond-precision wall-clock timestamp wrapped over i64; converts to chrono DateTime.

nodes.name: Hash
nodes.summary: 32-byte blake3-derived content hash with hex display, zero-hash sentinel, and digest helper.

nodes.name: Version
nodes.summary: Semantic version triple (major.minor.patch) with bump helpers and FromStr parser.

nodes.name: chaos_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Chaos tests: random energy spikes, sustained-load throttling, concurrent state modifications, extreme values, recovery, and deterministic-seed reproducibility.

nodes.name: ThrottledGate
nodes.summary: Test fixture gate with green/amber/red thresholds, throttle factor, and decision counters.

nodes.name: Decision
nodes.summary: Allow / Throttle{factor} / Block outcomes for the chaos gate.

nodes.name: ChaosState
nodes.summary: Test coherence state: nodes, edges, atomic op counter; supports perturb/energy compute.

nodes.name: GateStats
nodes.summary: Aggregate decision counters and rate metrics for ThrottledGate.

nodes.name: gpu_coherence_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Feature-gated GPU coherence tests verifying CPU↔GPU energy parity, buffer alignment, error fallback, and resource lifecycle on triangle/coherent/large graphs.

nodes.name: create_triangle_graph
nodes.summary: Builds a three-node SheafGraph triangle with identity restrictions for GPU tests.

nodes.name: create_coherent_graph
nodes.summary: Builds a two-node SheafGraph with identical states (near-zero expected energy).

nodes.name: create_large_graph
nodes.summary: Generates a configurable SheafGraph with n nodes and k edges per node for scale tests.

nodes.name: coherence_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Coherence-Computation integration tests covering energy correctness, incremental updates, hotspot detection, scoped aggregation, fingerprint caching, and parallel computation.

nodes.name: RestrictionMap
nodes.summary: Test-local affine restriction map (matrix + bias) with apply/output_dim helpers.

nodes.name: TestEdge
nodes.summary: Test-local edge type combining source/target ids, weight, and dual restriction maps.

nodes.name: compute_total_energy
nodes.summary: Sums per-edge sheaf energies and reports a per-edge breakdown map.

nodes.name: gate_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Coherence gate + compute-ladder tests: green/amber/red decisions, escalation across Local→Neighborhood→Global→Spectral, persistence detection, and latency budgets.

nodes.name: GateDecision
nodes.summary: Allow / Throttle{factor} / Block outcomes returned by the test gate.

nodes.name: ComputeLane
nodes.summary: Compute ladder lanes: Local (O(1)), Neighborhood{k}, Global (O(n)), Spectral (O(n^o(1))).

nodes.name: ThresholdConfig
nodes.summary: Threshold config bundling green/amber/red levels, escalation toggle, and max lane.

nodes.name: CoherenceGate
nodes.summary: Test gate engine tracking decisions, current lane, history window, and persistence.

nodes.name: governance_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Governance integration tests for PolicyBundle lifecycle, multi-approver workflows, WitnessChain integrity, LineageRecord hashes, and no-action-without-witness/no-write-without-lineage invariants.

nodes.name: Hash
nodes.summary: Test-local 32-byte hash with zero/compute helpers (non-cryptographic mixing function).

nodes.name: PolicyStatus
nodes.summary: Draft / PendingApproval / Active / Superseded states for governance policies.

nodes.name: ApprovalSignature
nodes.summary: Single approver signature with id, timestamp, and signature bytes.

nodes.name: ThresholdConfig
nodes.summary: Test-local threshold config used inside policy bundles.

nodes.name: PolicyBundle
nodes.summary: Versioned policy bundle with thresholds, required approvals, signatures, content hash, and lifecycle transitions.

nodes.name: WitnessRecord
nodes.summary: Single witness audit entry binding action hash, energy snapshot, decision, policy ref, prev id, and content hash.

nodes.name: GateDecision
nodes.summary: Allow / Throttle / Block tag stored inside WitnessRecord.

nodes.name: WitnessChain
nodes.summary: Append-only chain of WitnessRecord values with chain-integrity verification.

nodes.name: LineageRecord
nodes.summary: Operation lineage entry tying entity ref, op, deps, witness id, actor, and timestamp into a content hash.

nodes.name: Operation
nodes.summary: Create / Update / Delete / Derive operation tag for lineage records.

nodes.name: graph_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Knowledge Substrate tests covering SheafGraph CRUD, restriction-map dimension validation, k-hop subgraph extraction, namespace isolation, and fingerprint stability.

nodes.name: identity_restriction
nodes.summary: Builds an identity-matrix restriction map of the given dimension.

nodes.name: projection_restriction
nodes.summary: Builds a rectangular projection map that keeps the first output_dim coordinates.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Integration test module root wiring coherence_tests, gate_tests, governance_tests, and graph_tests.

nodes.name: coherence_properties.rs
nodes.summary: QuickCheck property tests for sheaf coherence invariants: energy non-negativity, consistent-section zero, residual symmetry, weight scaling, additivity, monotonicity, and numeric stability.

nodes.name: BoundedFloat
nodes.summary: Arbitrary wrapper producing finite f32 values in [-1000, 1000].

nodes.name: NonNegativeFloat
nodes.summary: Arbitrary wrapper producing finite non-negative f32 weights.

nodes.name: PositiveFloat
nodes.summary: Arbitrary wrapper producing strictly positive f32 weights.

nodes.name: StateVector
nodes.summary: Arbitrary fixed-dimension state vector used as quickcheck input.

nodes.name: IdentityMap
nodes.summary: Identity restriction shim used by property tests.

nodes.name: SimpleRestrictionMap
nodes.summary: Linear restriction map with identity constructor and Arbitrary impl.

nodes.name: compute_residual
nodes.summary: Computes rho_source(x_s) - rho_target(x_t) residual vector.

nodes.name: compute_energy
nodes.summary: Computes weight · ‖residual‖² edge energy.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Property-test module root mounting coherence_properties.

nodes.name: replay_determinism.rs
nodes.summary: Replay determinism tests: appending events to an EventLog and replaying must yield identical state fingerprints under updates, partial replay, deletion cascades, and concurrent threads.

nodes.name: DomainEvent
nodes.summary: Replayable domain events: node/edge add/update/remove, edge weight update, threshold change.

nodes.name: CoherenceState
nodes.summary: Test coherence state replaying DomainEvents into node/edge/threshold maps with cached energy and deterministic fingerprint.

nodes.name: EventLog
nodes.summary: Append-only event log supporting full replay and replay-up-to-timestamp.

nodes.name: ruvllm_integration_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Feature-gated RuvLLM coherence integration tests: SheafCoherenceValidator, UnifiedWitnessLog, PatternToRestrictionBridge, MemoryCoherenceLayer, and CoherenceConfidence sigmoid.

nodes.name: LlmResponse
nodes.summary: Mock LLM response with text segments, per-segment embeddings, and generation metadata.

nodes.name: ResponseMetadata
nodes.summary: Mock model/temperature/top_p/latency metadata for an LlmResponse.

nodes.name: SheafCoherenceValidator
nodes.summary: Validates LLM responses via pairwise embedding similarity, contradiction patterns, and topic-drift detection.

nodes.name: ValidationResult
nodes.summary: Coherence verdict, score, violations list, and optional witness.

nodes.name: CoherenceViolation
nodes.summary: Pair-of-segments coherence violation record with type and severity.

nodes.name: ViolationType
nodes.summary: Contradiction / TopicDrift / LogicalInconsistency violation categories.

nodes.name: CoherenceWitness
nodes.summary: Generation witness carrying outcome, score, segment/violation counts, metadata, timestamp, and hash.

nodes.name: UnifiedWitnessLog
nodes.summary: Hash-chained witness log linking CoherenceWitness entries via previous_hash content hashes.

nodes.name: WitnessEntry
nodes.summary: Single chain entry: id, witness, previous_hash, content_hash.

nodes.name: PatternToRestrictionBridge
nodes.summary: Learns success/failure patterns from validation outcomes and exports them as a PatternGraph.

nodes.name: LearnedPattern
nodes.summary: Stored embedding plus outcome tag, weight, and occurrence count.

nodes.name: PatternOutcome
nodes.summary: Success / Failure outcome marker for learned patterns.

nodes.name: PatternGraph
nodes.summary: Exported graph of pattern nodes and similarity edges derived from learned patterns.

nodes.name: MemoryCoherenceLayer
nodes.summary: Memory store with contradiction-aware ingestion using cosine similarity and negation heuristics.

nodes.name: CoherenceConfidence
nodes.summary: Sigmoid mapping from coherence energy to a [0,1] confidence score with threshold/steepness knobs.

nodes.name: cosine_similarity
nodes.summary: Numerically-safe cosine similarity between two equal-length f32 vectors.

nodes.name: create_simple_embedding
nodes.summary: Char-hash-based normalized embedding generator used as a mock encoder in tests.

nodes.name: storage_tests.rs
nodes.summary: Comprehensive InMemoryStorage and FileStorage tests: CRUD, similarity search, governance store, WAL recovery, JSON/Bincode formats, multi-tenant isolation, durability, and property tests.

nodes.name: btsp_bench.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmark suite for BTSP synapse update, layer forward, one-shot associative learning, and associative memory store/retrieve at 100/1k/10k scales.

nodes.name: bench_synapse_update
nodes.summary: Benchmarks BTSPSynapse::update with and without plateau potential.

nodes.name: bench_layer_forward
nodes.summary: Benchmarks BTSPLayer::forward throughput across 100/1k/10k neuron sizes.

nodes.name: bench_one_shot_learning
nodes.summary: Benchmarks BTSPLayer::one_shot_associate single-trial learning at increasing scales.

nodes.name: bench_associative_memory
nodes.summary: Benchmarks BTSPAssociativeMemory store_one_shot and retrieve operations.

nodes.name: eprop_bench.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for e-prop synapse updates, network forward/backward sweeps, online step, and per-size memory footprint at 100–5000 hidden neurons.

nodes.name: bench_synapse_update
nodes.summary: Benchmarks EpropSynapse::update with spike, voltage, reward, and learning-rate inputs.

nodes.name: bench_network_forward
nodes.summary: Benchmarks EpropNetwork::forward at 100/500/1000 hidden neurons.

nodes.name: bench_network_backward
nodes.summary: Benchmarks EpropNetwork::backward error propagation at multiple hidden sizes.

nodes.name: bench_online_step
nodes.summary: Benchmarks a complete online e-prop step on a 1000-neuron network.

nodes.name: bench_memory_footprint
nodes.summary: Benchmarks EpropNetwork construction memory cost across sizes.

nodes.name: ewc_bench.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for EWC Fisher computation, regularization loss, gradient, and ComplementaryLearning consolidation up to 1M parameters.

nodes.name: bench_fisher_computation
nodes.summary: Benchmarks EWC::compute_fisher over 50 gradient samples at 1k–1M parameter sizes.

nodes.name: bench_ewc_loss
nodes.summary: Benchmarks EWC::ewc_loss across parameter scales.

nodes.name: bench_ewc_gradient
nodes.summary: Benchmarks EWC::ewc_gradient across parameter scales.

nodes.name: bench_consolidation
nodes.summary: Benchmarks ComplementaryLearning::consolidate over varying replay-buffer sizes.

nodes.name: bench_experience_storage
nodes.summary: Benchmarks ComplementaryLearning::store_experience throughput.

nodes.name: hdc_bench.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for Hypervector creation, bind, bundle, similarity/hamming, and HdcMemory store/retrieve/top-k across capacities up to 10k.

nodes.name: bench_vector_creation
nodes.summary: Benchmarks Hypervector::random and from_seed constructors.

nodes.name: bench_binding
nodes.summary: Benchmarks pairwise bind on Hypervector instances and the free-function variant.

nodes.name: bench_bundling
nodes.summary: Benchmarks bundle() across 3/5/10/20/50 vector inputs.

nodes.name: bench_similarity
nodes.summary: Benchmarks cosine-style similarity and hamming distance on Hypervectors.

nodes.name: bench_memory_operations
nodes.summary: Benchmarks HdcMemory store/retrieve/top-k across 10/100/1k/10k entries.

nodes.name: bench_end_to_end
nodes.summary: Benchmarks an end-to-end HDC workflow: build 100-vector memory and run top-k retrieval.

nodes.name: latency_benchmarks.rs
nodes.summary: Cross-cutting P50/P99/P99.9 latency benchmarks for event bus, HDC, WTA, Hopfield, pattern separation, plasticity, and cognitum (mostly placeholder kernels pending real wiring).

nodes.name: benchmark_event_bus
nodes.summary: Benchmarks event publish, bounded-queue delivery, and priority routing latencies (placeholder bodies).

nodes.name: benchmark_hdc
nodes.summary: Benchmarks bitvector binding, bundling, hamming distance, and similarity at 10k-bit width.

nodes.name: benchmark_wta
nodes.summary: Benchmarks argmax, k-WTA top-k selection, and lateral-inhibition update over 1000-element inputs.

nodes.name: benchmark_hopfield
nodes.summary: Benchmarks ModernHopfield-style pattern retrieval, storage, and energy computation (placeholder bodies).

nodes.name: benchmark_pattern_separation
nodes.summary: Benchmarks orthogonal encoding, collision detection, and decorrelation latency.

nodes.name: benchmark_plasticity
nodes.summary: Benchmarks e-prop gradient update, BTSP eligibility trace update, and EWC Fisher update kernels.

nodes.name: benchmark_cognitum
nodes.summary: Benchmarks reflex-arc latency and v0 adapter dispatch (placeholder).

nodes.name: pattern_separation.rs
nodes.summary: Criterion benchmarks for the DentateGyrus sparse encoder: per-dimension encode latency, jaccard/hamming similarity, and sparsity-level sweeps.

nodes.name: bench_encoding
nodes.summary: Benchmarks DentateGyrus::encode at 128/256/512-dim inputs.

nodes.name: bench_similarity
nodes.summary: Benchmarks jaccard_similarity and hamming_distance on sparse encodings.

nodes.name: bench_sparsity_levels
nodes.summary: Benchmarks encoding cost at 2%/3%/5% sparsity levels with a 10k-neuron DG.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for ruvector-nervous-system: bio-inspired neural crate with optional parallel (rayon) and serde (bincode) features, six criterion benches, and 13 tiered example binaries; lints are mostly relaxed for research-tier code.

nodes.name: compete-implementation.md
nodes.summary: Implementation report for the K-Winner-Take-All competition kernel: WTALayer + LateralInhibition + KWTALayer with module layout, struct sketches, and ~942 LOC summary.

nodes.name: EWC_IMPLEMENTATION.md
nodes.summary: Implementation report for Elastic Weight Consolidation: EWC struct, ComplementaryLearning hippocampus/neocortex split, Fisher diagonal math, and test/bench scaffolding.
